inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 net cash from operating activities $1,493.7M / 192.7M weighted average shares (2025 annual report MD&A)
inputs.normalization_note: Royalty model: owner cash approximates operating cash flow; minimal sustaining capex. FY2025 includes in-kind bullion timing; Q1 2026 OCF includes $49.5M CRA refund (not in FCF0). Cobre Panamá and development royalties excluded from base growth.
inputs.shares_source: Derived from inputs.shares_millions in the pre-existing valuation.json; [HUMAN REVIEW] confirm against the latest primary filing.

optionality_gate.notes: No debt; $3.4B available capital Q1 2026. Dividend yield ~0.8% at spot price is not a dhando floor; partial dhando from zero recourse leverage and portfolio optionality.

bear.notes: Gold/silver mean-revert from record prices; GEO volumes flat; Cobre Panamá stays limited; multiple compresses

base.notes: 2026 GEO guidance 510-570k; fixed conversion ratios; dividend $1.76/yr; mid-single-digit cash flow growth [Assumption] off FY2025 record

bull.notes: Cobre Panamá full restart; oil price tailwind; new acquisitions plus exploration optionality

segments.label: Precious metal royalties & streams
segments.evidence: FY2025 ~88% of GEOs from gold/silver/PGM; 2026 guidance ~90% precious

segments.label: Diversified (oil, gas, iron ore, other mining)
segments.evidence: FY2025 diversified ~12% of GEOs; Q1 2026 oil price sensitivity per CEO

options.label: Cobre Panamá restart / stockpile processing
options.base_terminal_rationale: 11,208 GEOs in FY2025; GOP stockpile approval positive; full restart not in 2026 guidance — P-weighted overlay only

options.label: Development & exploration royalty book
options.base_terminal_rationale: No audited fair values for pre-production portfolio; exploration upside in bull scenario growth only
options.evidence: 2025 annual report — deep portfolio; operator exploration spend not capitalized as FNV asset

nav_overlay_options.label: Cobre Panamá
nav_overlay_options.base_terminal_rationale: ~$0.8B enterprise value / 192.8M shares; partial restart probability [Assumption]

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Shareholders equity $7.6B vs economic royalty portfolio; intangibles carry contractual cash flows not fully marked to spot commodity prices

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Cobre Panamá; Tocantinzinho stream; development assets per corporate presentations

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: No operating mines; corporate G&A modest vs revenue

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Royalties recognized as operators produce and sell

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Equity investments in available capital ($1.1B+ Q1 2026); marks in financials

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Q1 2026 CRA refund $49.5M in operating cash flow — one-time, excluded from normalized growth [Assumption]

option_scan.question: Embedded option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Record gold/silver prices in FY2025-Q1 2026 revenue; oil exposure in diversified segment

catalyst_paths.event: Cobre Panamá formal restart / stockpile processing

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

nav_overlay.notes: Do not use GAAP book as dhando floor

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

indicators.label: Gold spot (USD/oz)
indicators.source: yahoo:GLD (GLD price proxy when London fix unavailable)

peer_context.note: Context only; percentile rank not in base IRR.

top_dissents.label: Mohnish Pabrai
top_dissents.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete non-overlapping component schedule. The legacy Lawrence return path remains a separate stance gate until the primary evidence bridges are complete.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Phase 3 scaffold identifies every currently known material operating, financial, liability, reserve, and option claim once. Primary ownership and cash/NAV bridges remain open follow-up gates.

components.label: Producing precious-metal royalty and stream cash flows

valuation.evidence: Existing FNV valuation inputs: FY2025 net cash from operating activities $1,493.7M / 192.7M weighted average shares (2025 annual report MD&A); Royalty model: owner cash approximates operating cash flow; minimal sustaining capex. FY2025 includes in-kind bullion timing; Q1 2026 OCF includes $49.5M CRA refund (not in FCF0). Cobre Panamá and development royalties excluded from base growth. [HUMAN REVIEW — Phase 3 scaffold requires a primary-source bridge].
valuation.assumption_summary: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile the range to primary filings, a reproducible owner-cash or NAV bridge, and the identified liability and capital claims before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of FNV, including every currently identified operating claim, financial claim, liability, reserve, and material option.
economic_claim.unit_source: Derived from inputs.shares_millions in the pre-existing valuation.json; [HUMAN REVIEW] confirm against the latest primary filing.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are separate components or explicitly reserved. No component is intended to overlap another.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Existing research and filing-derived valuation inputs. The primary-source reconciliation remains an open evidence gate.

component_groups.label: Producing precious-metal royalty and stream cash flows
component_groups.economic_claim: Producing precious-metal royalty and stream cash flows
component_groups.valuation_basis: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
component_groups.adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key producing_royalty_stream; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Development-stage and optional royalty inventory

component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key development_inventory_option; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is explicit analyst judgment pending a primary-source milestone and ownership reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: The range includes delay and failure outcomes; dated cash realization remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital, financing, and dilution are reserved until the primary sources-and-uses bridge is complete.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Producing precious-metal royalty and stream cash flows
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
